data.title: Write structural boundary tests for single-agent-integrate.md
data.description: Create tests/hooks/test-single-agent-integrate-structure.sh. Structural boundary tests (Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5). 9 assertions: (1) file exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/single-agent-integrate.md, (2) contains step headings, (3) contains 'dso harvest-worktree' or 'harvest-worktree', (4) references REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, (5) contains '[ "$WORKTREE_PATH" =' (bash guard), (6) contains 'cd $WORKTREE_PATH &&', (7) contains 'CONTEXT ANCHOR' (exact string), (8) contains 'ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT', (9) contains 'WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS' AND pattern 'cd.*WORKTREE_PATH.*get_artifacts_dir|WORKTREE_PATH.*source.*get_artifacts_dir'. All 9 assertions RED before T2. testing_mode: RED
